title: ficus gummifera
intro: Ficus gummifera, also known as Indian rubber tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its large, spreading branches and milky latex. The medicinal properties of Ficus gummifera include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Ficus gummifera can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in different ways.
